creator: wen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 227029
Update to 1.20.3 and add missing TEST_DEPENDS

The test of numpy-1.20.3 require devel/py-hypothesis, I upload the revised patch
with this change. There are 7 fails in all 12000+ tests on my amd64-head system.

Shall we ask for another exp-run for numpy ?
